channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Where Obamacare enrollment is plummeting
item.description: Data from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services shows that Ohio, Oklahoma, Arizona, South Carolina, and Minnesota have seen significant enrollment declines.

item.title: Trump's Iran grievance looms over NATO summit as he demands loyalty
item.description: President Trump arrives at Tuesday's NATO summit in Ankara still angry at allies who refused to help him fight Iran and determined to make sure...

item.title: America's shrinking middle: The 45-64 population decline
item.description: Data: U.S. Census Bureau Vintage 2025 population estimates; Chart: Russell Contreras/Axios America has a missing-middle problem, and this one is demographic...

item.title: Iran resumes Strait of Hormuz attacks after pause, U.S. officials say
item.description: Iran's military fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz on Monday night, two U.S. officials tell Axios. Why it...
